title: Hulis Z-Crystals
body:
# Hulis Z-Crystals > Hulis Z-Crystals is a mod that adds Z-Crystals to Minecraft
> If you like my work consider supporting me on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/huligani123)
> Thanks to Sanji for making the Textures ## Configuration > The Configuration file for this mod is located in the `config` folder under `zcrystals`
>> COMMAND_Z_RING_PERMISSION_LEVEL: The Permission Level required to use the `/keyitem` command
>> Default: `4`
> >> SERVERSIDE: If the Mod should be launched Serverside only or require it to be installed on clients
>> Default: `false`
## Getting Started > To get started you need 2 things: >>Some Blank Z-Crystals ![Blank Z-Crystal](https://i.imgur.com/neM2KgG_d.webp?maxwidth=760&fidelity=grand)
>>A Z-Ring ![Z-Ring](https://i.imgur.com/B7kWRbp_d.webp?maxwidth=760&fidelity=grand) Once you have the Z-Ring you need to right-click in the Air to enable using Z-Moves
> Once you do that you will have a button for Z-Moves in your Battle GUI when
> a Pokémon is holding a Z-Crystal that can use a Z-Move.
## Obtaining Z-Crystals > Z-Crystals are obtained by right-clicking certain Blocks/Entities with a Blank Z-Crystal
> The Z-Crystal will be consumed, and you will get a Z-Crystal
> ### Normalium Z > Made by crafting a Blank Z-Crystal with nothing in a shapeless recipe
> ![Normalium Z](https://i.imgur.com/A1Keq1U_d.webp?maxwidth=760&fidelity=grand)
> ### Fightinium Z > Made by right-clicking a Bamboo Block with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Firium Z > Made by right-clicking a Magma Block with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Waterium Z > Made by right-clicking a Wet Sponge with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Electrium Z > Made by right-clicking a Copper Block with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Grassium Z > Made by right-clicking a Wheat Crop with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Icium Z > Made by right-clicking Powder Snow with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Rockium Z > Made by right-clicking Bedrock with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Steelium Z > Made by right-clicking an Iron Golem with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Poisonium Z > Made by right-clicking a Potato Crop with a Blank Z-Crystal **(Peaceful Mode Only)**
> Made by right-clicking a Cave Spider with a Blank Z-Crystal **(Every Mode except Peaceful)**
> ### Ghostium Z > Made by right-clicking Soul Sand with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Darkinium Z > Made by right-clicking Reinforced Deepslate with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Fairium Z > Made by right-clicking an Allay with a Blank Z-Crystal **(Peaceful Mode Only)**
> Made by right-clicking a Vex with a Blank Z-Crystal **(Every Mode except Peaceful)**
~~~~ > ### Dragonium Z > Made by right-clicking an End Portal Frame with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Buginium Z > Made by right-clicking a Beehive with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Psychium Z > Made by right-clicking an End Gateway with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Groundium Z > Made by right-clicking a Mud Block with a Blank Z-Crystal
> ### Flyinium Z > Made by right-clicking a Chicken with a Blank Z-Crystal
## Pokémon Specific Z-Crystals > ### Aloraichium Z > Made by right-clicking an Alolan Raichu with an Electrium Z
> ### Decidium Z > Made by right-clicking a Decidueye with a Grassium Z
> ### Incinium Z > Made by right-clicking an Incineroar with a Firium Z
> ### Primarium Z > Made by right-clicking a Primarina with a Waterium Z
> ### Pikanium Z > Made by right-clicking a Pikachu with an Electrium Z
> ### Pikashunium Z > Made by right-clicking a Hat Pikachu with an Electrium Z
> ### Tapunium Z > Made by right-clicking any Tapu with a Fairium Z
> ### Marshadium Z > Made by right-clicking a Marshadow with a Ghostium Z
> ### Mimikium Z > Made by right-clicking a Mimikyu with a Ghostium Z
> ### Lycanium Z > Made by right-clicking a Lycanroc with a Rockium Z
> ### Kommonium Z > Made by right-clicking a Kommo-o with a Dragonium Z
> ### Solganium Z > Made by right-clicking a Solgaleo with a Psychium Z
> ### Lunalium Z > Made by right-clicking a Lunala with a Psychium Z
> ### Ultranecrozium Z > Made by right-clicking a Necrozma with a Psychium Z (Currently not working in battle)
> ### Eevium Z > Made by right-clicking an Eevee with a Normalium Z
> ### Mewnium Z > Made by right-clicking a Mew with a Psychium Z
> ### Snorlium Z > Made by right-clicking a Snorlax with a Normalium Z
## Serverside Resource Pack > The Mod comes with a Serverside Resource Pack that changes the Z-Crystals to look like the ones from the games
> You will need to merge the resource pack with your own Server Resource Pack if you have one
> You can find the Resource Pack in this GitHub Repository [Hulis-Z-Crystals-Resource-Pack.zip](https://github.com/dujmovic-d/HulisZCrystals/blob/master/HulisZCrystalsResourcePack.zip)
